signals.title: USD/JPY — Geopolitical + Carry
signals.text: USD/JPY at 161.89 — 275bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains bid; BoJ meeting on 31 Jul may introduce intervention risk on a break above 160.00. JPY COT LF short −137,828 (crowded carry). Carry dominates until VIX > 25.

signals.title: AUD/USD — Positioning + Vol
signals.text: AUD/USD COT LF net long +21,597 vs elevated IV 38.1% — positioning stalling, vol premium +31.1% signals market hedging. AUD/USD at 0.6956. Watch for RBA meeting on 11 Aug.

signals.title: EUR/USD — G10 Bilateral Theme + Carry
signals.text: AUD (LEADER) +0.612% vs JPY (LAGGARD) −0.427% — G10 bilateral theme (spread 1.039%). EUR/USD at 1.1446; ECB 2.25% vs Fed 3.75% — 150bp carry favors USD.

signals.title: NZD/USD — COT vs OIS Divergence
signals.text: NZD/USD COT LF net short −25,757 vs RBNZ hike prob  priced for 27 Jul. If RBNZ delivers or signals hike, short-squeeze risk is elevated — crowded spec short unwind targets 0.5900+. NZD/USD at 0.5703.

signals.title: GBP/USD — Options Skew
signals.text: GBP/USD 25d RR at −0.67 — mild put skew signals options market biased for GBP weakness. GBP/USD at 1.3395.
